description: Eval cases for client-side security vulnerabilities: Cookie security, clickjacking, prototype pollution, third-party code security

cases.name: Missing HttpOnly flag on session cookie
cases.description: Session cookie set without HttpOnly flag, allowing XSS attacks to steal it

cases.name: Insecure cookie over HTTP
cases.description: Cookie set without secure flag on non-HTTPS connection

cases.name: Missing X-Frame-Options header
cases.description: Page can be embedded in iframe, vulnerable to clickjacking

cases.name: Prototype pollution via Object.assign
cases.description: User-controlled object merged into config without validation

cases.name: Untrusted third-party script with no integrity check
cases.description: Loading external script without Subresource Integrity (SRI)

cases.name: Overly permissive Content Security Policy
cases.description: CSP allows 'unsafe-inline' or overly broad sources
